title: Why the VLCC market had one of the strongest years in a decade - and what could lie ahead
section_path: Why the VLCC market had one of the strongest years in a decade - and what could lie ahead
section_path_text: Why the VLCC market had one of the strongest years in a decade - and what could lie ahead
summary:
Main
Image reference: assets/2026-01-09_why-the-vlcc-market-had-one-of-the-strongest-years-in-a-decade-and-what-could-li_img_1767711335630_8e087d6fffaa.jpg
By Mette Frederiksen
The VLCC market has just wrapped up one of its most powerful freight environments in years. Earnings surged past $100,000 per day, with momentum staying strong throughout Q3 and Q4. For much of the year, freight rates moved broadly in line with 2024 levels.
